description: Style Note This season's french connection line features cluthes with a fantastical burst of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Beige textured clutch bag with a satchel style buckle and a flap Has a zipped pocket inside the main compartment Material and Care Jute Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 15 cm Width: 30 cm
